semantic_description: Verifies lcm_simple, a scalar-only arithmetic loop. The function takes positive integers a and b, initializes x to a, repeatedly adds a while x is not divisible by b, and returns x. The contract states that the result equals the Coq definition lcm_simple_value a b, which is Z.lcm a b, with an INT_MAX guard on the mathematical result. The control flow is a single while loop; there is no heap or memory mutation beyond local scalar variables. The loop may execute zero times when a is already divisible by b.
